title: Chemeti group
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''''Chemeti''''' was a pair of [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. They were called to retrieve [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] prisoners and the [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defender]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] which were on the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Red Claw]]''. The first one was to pick up the pirates and the scientist while the second was going to deliver a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] engine to replace ''Red Claw''{{'s}} damaged one. Unfortunately, the [[Chemeti's impostor|first corvette]] was actually [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin's]] as part of a deception to retrieve the prisoners for Zaarin himself while the operation was attacked by TIE Defenders to divert attention.

The real corvettes arrived and delivered the hyperdrive to the ''Red Claw'' despite being attacked by [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] [[Z-Kopsh|''Kopsh'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]''
